title: Burn's Enchantment Extractor
description: The Enchantment Extractor. Lets you transfer your enchants from a tool to a book
body:
## Burn's Enchantment Extractor
A Vanilla+ mod that adds a single functional block; The Enchantment Extractor. 

### How It Looks:

![An image of the Enchantment Extractor in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c0df0eb15c19b74e1ea2c71a54e41bbf6c332a.png)

Its not uncommon to find loot with very good enchants, but you simply can't use it because it's a different material or type of item to the one you already have; Silk Touch gold pickaxes and Efficiency V stone shovels. Well despair no more, the Enchantment Extractor will let you transfer these enchants to an empty book for you to use with whatever you choose

### How It Works:

![In-game Screenshot of the Enchantment Extractor in action](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/792660212175732747/1437543161022120027/V1.2-HowItWorks.png?ex=6916eba5&is=69159a25&hm=e2d5349d40cd599fd0b82f53e521a5aca41d9c49bb56cf1c7d6702623f5d88e4&)

### How It's Crafted:

![An image of how it is crafted](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/792660212175732747/1437543161441554516/image.png?ex=69139fe5&is=69124e65&hm=d231cf56cd7ad09c6b2e8ab918f9f25eb5017acb1b4545328dbfc60c7b4e161b&)

Crafted using an Anvil, a red Carpet and 4 Diamonds, it may not be cheap, but it is quite useful.
